# services.szurubooru

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.szurubooru`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.szurubooru.client.package` | `package` | The client package to use. |
| `services.szurubooru.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The path to the data directory in which Szurubooru will store its data. |
| `services.szurubooru.database.host` | `string` | Host on which the PostgreSQL database runs. |
| `services.szurubooru.database.name` | `string` | Name of the PostgreSQL database. |
| `services.szurubooru.database.passwordFile` | `absolute path` | A file containing the password for the PostgreSQL user. |
| `services.szurubooru.database.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port under which PostgreSQL listens to. |
| `services.szurubooru.database.user` | `string` | PostgreSQL user. |
| `services.szurubooru.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Szurubooru, an image board engine dedicated for small and medium communities. |
| `services.szurubooru.group` | `string` | Group under which Szurubooru runs. |
| `services.szurubooru.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for the port in {option}`services.szurubooru.server.port`. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.host` | `string` | The host address for Szurubooru to bind to. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.package` | `package` | The server package to use. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to expose HTTP service. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Configuration to write to {file}`config.yaml`. See <https://github.com/rr-/szurubooru/blob/master/server/config.yaml.dist> for more information. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.data_dir` | `absolute path` | Path to the static files. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.data_url` | `string` | Full URL to the data endpoint. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.debug` | `signed integer` | Whether to generate server logs. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.delete_source_files` | `one of "yes", "no"` | Whether to delete thumbnails and source files on post delete. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.domain` | `string` | Full URL to the homepage of this szurubooru site (with no trailing slash). |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.name` | `string` | Name shown in the website title and on the front page. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.secretFile` | `absolute path` | File containing a secret used to salt the users' password hashes and generate filenames for static content. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.show_sql` | `signed integer` | Whether to show SQL in server logs. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.smtp.host` | `null or string` | Host of the SMTP server used to send reset password. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.smtp.passFile` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the password associated to the given user for the SMTP server. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.smtp.port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the SMTP server. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.settings.smtp.user` | `null or string` | User to connect to the SMTP server. |
| `services.szurubooru.server.threads` | `signed integer` | Number of waitress threads to start. |
| `services.szurubooru.user` | `string` | User account under which Szurubooru runs. |
